issues.description: The Read the Docs configuration installs the full `webclient/requirements.txt`, which also includes development/testing dependencies (Selenium, debug-toolbar, etc.); for a documentation build this is unnecessary and it lengthens the time and the risk of conflicts.
issues.recommendation: Consider creating a separate requirements file for the documentation (e.g. `docs/requirements.txt`) with a minimal set of packages and using it in `.readthedocs.yaml`.

documentation_generators.name: generate_module_docs.py
documentation_generators.description: Generates RST documentation for the Django modules in `webclient/` (models, forms, views, urls, etc.) and for the project scripts.
key_behaviour: AST parser for `urls.py` generating URL tables (including app_name and the view target).
Uses `check_content_changed` to avoid rewriting without a change (helps keep diffs readable).
When generating the URL routing documentation, it creates `docs/source/04_django_aplikace/04_01_core/url_routing.rst`.

documentation_generators.name: generate_selenium_test_docs.py
documentation_generators.description: Parses the docstrings of the Selenium tests (`test_selenium.py`) and generates an overview and details of the tests into `selenium_testy.rst`.
key_behaviour: Requires the presence of `Steps:` and `Expected:` sections in the docstring; structures them into RST sections.
Uses the markers `.. AUTO-GENERATED-SELENIUM-TESTS-START/END` for safe rewriting of the generated part.

documentation_generators.name: convert_to_rst.py
documentation_generators.description: Generates a table of Python library licenses from the output of `pip-licenses` into `docs/source/12_zavislosti/python_knihovny.rst`.
key_behaviour: Runs `pip-licenses` with the parameters `--format=json --with-urls --from=mixed --with-system` and converts the JSON output to an RST list-table.
Uses the placeholder `@licence_table` in the `knihovny_for_edit.rst` template, which it replaces with the generated rows.
For some packages (e.g. `wrapt`) it manually overrides the license field using the `LICENSES_MANUAL_FIXES` map.

issues.description: The script has no error handling for the `pip-licenses` run (e.g. a missing tool or invalid JSON), which may lead to poorly understandable tracebacks when generating the license table.
issues.recommendation: Add a check of `returncode` and a try/except around `json.loads`, with a user-friendly error message.

coverage_gaps.description: The Selenium documentation generator assumes docstrings on every `test_` method; any missing docstrings or `Steps`/`Expected` sections lead to the test not being well documented.
coverage_gaps.recommendation: Run `generate_selenium_test_docs.py` regularly in CI and fail the build if it finds a test without the required sections.
